calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Conservatorship
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Aleeta Van Runkle, Deputy City Attorney for Petitioner Cheryl Jay, M.D.

The Court stated for the record that the matter is taken off calendar based on the status report filed regarding placement of the patient has been transferred to Laguna Honda, and petition for conservatorship was withdrawn as a sister has been located and will make medical decision for the patient.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Investigator: Cynthia Jones. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy A. Allen. Not Reported.
